server/tests/test_edit_options.py :: test_from_form_empty_strings
def test_from_form_empty_strings() -> None:
    options = EditOptions.from_form()
    assert options.filter_name == "none"
    assert options.crop_x is None

server/tests/test_edit_options.py :: test_from_form_parses_positive_integers
def test_from_form_parses_positive_integers() -> None:
    options = EditOptions.from_form(
        crop_x="10",
        crop_y="5",
        crop_w="100",
        crop_h="80",
        resize_w="320",
        resize_h="240",
        filter="sepia",
    )
    assert options.has_crop()
    assert options.resize_width == 320
    assert options.filter_name == "sepia"

server/tests/test_edit_options.py :: test_from_dict_roundtrip
def test_from_dict_roundtrip() -> None:
    original = EditOptions(crop_x=1, crop_y=2, crop_width=3, crop_height=4, filter_name="invert")
    restored = EditOptions.from_dict(original.to_dict())
    assert restored.crop_x == 1
    assert restored.filter_name == "invert"
    assert restored.post_filter == "none"

server/tests/test_edit_options.py :: test_from_form_post_filter
def test_from_form_post_filter() -> None:
    options = EditOptions.from_form(post_filter="sharpen")
    assert options.post_filter == "sharpen"
